howItWorks.title: HOW IT WORKS
howItWorks.intro: Lotero is a provably fair, on-chain slot machine built on Base. Every spin is verified by Chainlink VRF (Verifiable Random Function), making it impossible for anyone to manipulate the results.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Connect any wallet that supports Base network (MetaMask, Coinbase, etc.)
howItWorks.step2Desc: You need at least 1.1 USDC in your wallet on Base network to play
howItWorks.step3Desc: Sign the payment authorization in your wallet. No gas needed — the agent handles everything
howItWorks.step4Desc: Chainlink VRF generates the random numbers on-chain. Results appear in a few seconds
howItWorks.step5Desc: If you win, your earnings accumulate and you can claim them anytime
howItWorks.payTableDesc: Match 3 of the same symbol to win. Each spin costs 1 USDC (+ 0.1 USDC service fee).
howItWorks.provablyFairIntro: Every spin uses Chainlink VRF 2.5 to generate verifiable random numbers on-chain. This means:
howItWorks.vrfPoint1: No one can predict or manipulate the outcome — not even the developers
howItWorks.vrfPoint2: Every result can be verified on the blockchain
howItWorks.vrfPoint3: The smart contract is open-source and auditable
howItWorks.vrfPoint4: The RTP (Return to Player) is ~93%, hardcoded in the contract
howItWorks.contractAddress: The contract address on Base is
howItWorks.noGasIntro: Lotero uses the x402 payment protocol so you never need ETH for gas. When you hit SPIN:
howItWorks.noGasPoint1: You sign a USDC transfer authorization (not a transaction)
howItWorks.noGasPoint2: The Lotero agent receives your payment and executes the spin on your behalf
howItWorks.noGasPoint3: You only need USDC in your wallet — no ETH required
howItWorks.noGasPoint4: Your wallet may show a security warning when signing — this is normal for x402 gasless payments and does not indicate a scam
howItWorks.referralIntro: Invite friends and earn 1% of every bet they make (first-time players only).
howItWorks.refPoint1: Get your unique referral link from the game page
howItWorks.refPoint2: Share it with friends via X, Telegram, or WhatsApp
howItWorks.refPoint3: When they play for the first time using your link, you earn 1% of their bets forever
howItWorks.refPoint4: Claim your referral earnings anytime from the Rewards panel
